owner_authorization: User requested completion of the four named B4 data-quality remediations on 2026-07-15.
purpose: Resolve or decision-bound the corporate-action, historical-fee, cash-series, and Webull Thailand capability gaps without opening L-1 validation data or changing the primary signal.

corporate_actions.source: Existing hashed Yahoo chart containers for VTI, VGK, EWJ, VWO, IEF, TIP, GLD, and DBC.
corporate_actions.method: Reconstruct total-return growth from provider close plus dividend events and compare it with the independently supplied adjusted-close field; inspect every split event for continuity.
corporate_actions.pass_rule: All eight symbols have complete event fields, maximum absolute cumulative relative divergence is at most 0.002, maximum daily return divergence is at most 0.0005, and no record crosses 2015-12-31.
corporate_actions.claim_limit: A pass verifies within-container arithmetic only. It does not create a point-in-time revision archive or independent exchange-native raw-close provenance.

sources_in_priority_order: SEC EDGAR filing full-text search and filing archives
Official fund sponsor prospectus or fee disclosures
historical_expense_ratios.method: Acquire dated official fee disclosures for each of the eight instruments and record effective or filing dates, stated annual expense or sponsor fee, source URL, and content hash.
historical_expense_ratios.full_resolution_rule: Every falsification session is covered by an official then-current fee observation or a legally fixed contractual fee with no uncovered interval longer than 18 months.
historical_expense_ratios.decision_bound_rule: If full history is unavailable, report the uncovered intervals and compare the original booked expense drag with the gross-to-net gap. The fee gap is decision-bounded only when removing 100% of booked ETF expenses cannot make the primary net geometric return positive.
historical_expense_ratios.selection_rule: Historical fee evidence may not be selected to improve the L-1 result; no revised expense path becomes claim-eligible without a superseding experiment gate.

cash_series.availability_rule: A published yield may affect cash only from the next NYSE session; missing publication days carry the last known yield, not a price.
cash_series.coverage_rule: Every opened falsification session must have a prior published yield after the initial warmup; no value after 2015-12-31 may be read.
cash_series.rerun_rule: Run the same five locked L-1 trials once with the cash series as the only economic-model change. primary_60 remains the result; sensitivities remain non-claim-eligible; append all trials to the complete search log.
cash_series.comparison_rule: Report original-zero-cash versus remediated-cash metrics and never replace or rewrite the original B4 report.

official_sources: https://www.webull.co.th/help/faq/355-ฉันสามารถซื้อขายแบบเศษหุ้นได้หรือไม่
webull_thailand.manual_capability_rule: Public documentation may verify general Thailand mobile fractional capability, order type, session, and precision, but not per-symbol green-diamond eligibility.
webull_thailand.openapi_capability_rule: Fractional OpenAPI is verified only if Thailand documentation explicitly supports notional orders or fractional quantity. General US stock/ETF and QTY order documentation is insufficient.
webull_thailand.ticker_eligibility_rule: Each current-capital candidate requires a dated account/app observation of the green-diamond indicator. No login, account query, token, credential, preview, paper order, or real order is authorized in B4.1.
webull_thailand.outcome_rule: Classify each item as verified_public, requires_account_observation, or not_documented; do not substitute global Webull capability for Thailand capability.

required_outputs: dataset registry entries and complete source hashes
hard_stops: Any market or cash observation after 2015-12-31 would be read.
A source requires credentials, account identifiers, order preview, paper order, or real order.
A paid source or external message is required without separate owner authorization.
The locked L-1 primary signal, universe, costs other than cash yield, or decision rules would change.
A result would be promoted above E1 or described as edge evidence.
